title: Add wc_AesCfbEncrypt/Decrypt bindings to wolfcrypt-rs
description: wc_AesCfbEncrypt and wc_AesCfbDecrypt exist in the wolfSSL C headers (~/wolfssl/wolfssl/wolfcrypt/aes.h lines 548-562) but have no Rust FFI bindings in wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs. Add them under #[cfg(wolfssl_aes_cfb)] next to the existing wc_AesOfbEncrypt binding (line ~2931). Signatures: wc_AesCfbEncrypt(aes: *mut WcAes, out: *mut u8, in_: *const u8, sz: u32) -> c_int; wc_AesCfbDecrypt same. WcAes struct and wc_AesInit/wc_AesSetKey/wc_AesFree are already bound.
